note: Staged issue data for ROADMAP MAIN.1 hardening. This file is intentionally dry-run only until the MAIN and MAIN.1 roadmaps and cleanup plan are reviewed. It avoids tasks already completed by EPIC-21 through EPIC-26.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-01: Compiler Hardening and Supported Syntax Matrix
epics.summary: Define and harden the compiler's alpha-supported source shapes without duplicating the EPIC-21 compiler MVP.
epics.goal: Every supported compiler shape has a fixture and every unsupported shape fails clearly.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-02: Plan Schema and Compatibility Hardening
epics.summary: Move alpha route/module/provider/capability metadata into a validated Plan contract.
epics.goal: Make the Sloppy Plan trustworthy for alpha startup validation.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-03: Runtime App Host Hardening
epics.summary: Harden native startup validation for app-host concepts that are currently bootstrap-only.
epics.goal: Validate supported app-host metadata before serving.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-04: HTTP Runtime Hardening
epics.summary: Harden the alpha HTTP request/response path beyond the EPIC-23 MVP.
epics.goal: Make supported HTTP behavior clear, tested, and deterministic.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-05: V8 Runtime Hardening
epics.summary: Harden V8 ownership, bootstrap, source-map, and async boundaries for alpha execution.
epics.goal: Report V8 success only from V8-gated validation and document bridge limits clearly.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-06: Diagnostics Completion
epics.summary: Complete JSON/source-frame/source-map/redaction diagnostics needed for alpha.
epics.goal: Make alpha errors useful for humans and tools without leaking secrets.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-07: Resource Lifecycle and JS-Native Handles
epics.summary: Implement safe native resource IDs for JavaScript-visible resources.
epics.goal: Prevent raw native pointer exposure and validate kind/generation/lifetime.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-08: SQLite JS-to-Native Data Bridge
epics.summary: Make one database story executable through real Sloppy by bridging SQLite to JavaScript.
epics.goal: Either ship an executable SQLite alpha path or explicitly defer it before public docs.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-09: Provider Hardening
epics.summary: Harden provider boundaries, live-test reporting, pooling, packaging, and redaction.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-10: Capability and Security Hardening
epics.summary: Enforce declared capabilities for supported alpha resource access.
epics.goal: Make security and permission docs match runtime enforcement.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-11: CLI Introspection Hardening
epics.summary: Make CLI introspection reflect real compiler/app-host metadata.
epics.goal: Keep routes, doctor, audit, and OpenAPI deterministic and honest.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-12: Packaging and Cross-Platform Hardening
epics.summary: Harden package and CI evidence for alpha without creating public release claims.
epics.goal: Make package and CI docs say exactly what each gate proves.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-13: End-to-End Conformance Suite
epics.summary: Cover supported alpha workflows end to end through the real toolchain.
epics.goal: Every public alpha example is executable or explicitly marked static/deferred.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-14: Benchmarks and Performance Methodology
epics.summary: Make performance measurement honest without public comparison claims.
epics.goal: Keep benchmark smoke separate from performance evidence.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN1-15: Public Alpha Documentation and Examples
epics.summary: Publish public alpha docs only for verified, executable workflows.
epics.goal: Keep public docs behind MAIN.1 hardening and avoid marketing or unsupported claims.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-01.A: Supported Compiler Syntax Matrix
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-01: Compiler Hardening and Supported Syntax Matrix
tasks.summary: Document the compiler syntax that alpha supports and rejects.
tasks.goal: Create the source of truth for compiler fixtures and diagnostics.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-01.B: Compiler Diagnostics Fixture Expansion
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-01: Compiler Hardening and Supported Syntax Matrix
tasks.summary: Add positive and negative compiler fixtures for the supported syntax matrix.
tasks.goal: Prevent silent partial extraction or accidental syntax support.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-01.C: Source-Input Run Handoff Design
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-01: Compiler Hardening and Supported Syntax Matrix
tasks.summary: Design the source-input sloppy run handoff without duplicating artifact-run MVP work.
tasks.goal: Decide whether alpha supports source input directly or keeps the two-step artifact workflow.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-02.A: Native Plan Route Section
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-02: Plan Schema and Compatibility Hardening
tasks.summary: Make route metadata a native Plan section with validation and fixtures.
tasks.goal: Replace interim route metadata with a documented alpha contract.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-02.B: Plan Provider and Capability Sections
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-02: Plan Schema and Compatibility Hardening
tasks.summary: Add provider and capability Plan sections required by alpha hardening.
tasks.goal: Give runtime security and provider startup validation structured metadata.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-02.C: Artifact Hash and Compatibility Checks
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-02: Plan Schema and Compatibility Hardening
tasks.summary: Replace placeholder artifact hashes with deterministic compatibility checks.
tasks.goal: Detect plan/bundle/source-map drift before user code executes.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-03.A: Native App Graph Startup Validation
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-03: Runtime App Host Hardening
tasks.summary: Validate supported app-host metadata before serving.
tasks.goal: Move alpha app-host errors from late runtime surprises to startup diagnostics.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-03.B: Module and Service Metadata Validation
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-03: Runtime App Host Hardening
tasks.summary: Validate module ordering and service token metadata from the Plan.
tasks.goal: Harden bootstrap-only module/service concepts into native startup checks.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-03.C: Request Scope Lifecycle Contract
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-03: Runtime App Host Hardening
tasks.summary: Define and test request-scope ownership, cleanup, and disposal behavior.
tasks.goal: Prepare services/resources for real request execution.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-04.A: HTTP Route Table and Precedence
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-04: HTTP Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Harden route selection, precedence, and ambiguity diagnostics.
tasks.goal: Make alpha route matching deterministic beyond borrowed route binding arrays.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-04.B: Request Context Limits and Unsupported Body Diagnostics
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-04: HTTP Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Define request context limits and fail unsupported body/header behavior clearly.
tasks.goal: Avoid silent gaps in handler request context.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-04.C: Result Serialization Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-04: HTTP Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Harden supported Results descriptors and malformed descriptor diagnostics.
tasks.goal: Keep the public Results surface aligned with runtime behavior.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-05.A: V8 Owner Thread and Shutdown Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-05: V8 Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Document and test V8 ownership and shutdown boundaries.
tasks.goal: Prevent unsafe isolate entry and unclear teardown behavior.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-05.B: V8 Promise and Microtask Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-05: V8 Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Define alpha behavior for async handlers, promises, and microtasks.
tasks.goal: Avoid pretending asynchronous JavaScript is supported before policy and tests exist.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-05.C: V8 Exception Source Mapping
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-05: V8 Runtime Hardening
tasks.summary: Map V8 failures back to compiler source where possible.
tasks.goal: Make V8 runtime errors usable for alpha developers.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-06.A: JSON Diagnostic Renderer
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-06: Diagnostics Completion
tasks.summary: Add machine-readable JSON diagnostics for alpha tools.
tasks.goal: Let CLI/compiler/runtime failures be consumed by tools without parsing text.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-06.B: Source Frame Diagnostics
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-06: Diagnostics Completion
tasks.summary: Add source-frame rendering and snapshots for user-facing diagnostics.
tasks.goal: Make source errors readable without overclaiming source-map completeness.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-06.C: Diagnostics Redaction Audit
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-06: Diagnostics Completion
tasks.summary: Audit and test redaction across providers, CLI, and runtime diagnostics.
tasks.goal: Prevent secrets from leaking through alpha diagnostics.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-07.A: Resource ID and Table Core
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-07: Resource Lifecycle and JS-Native Handles
tasks.summary: Implement the core generation-counted resource table.
tasks.goal: Give native resources stable JS-visible IDs without raw pointer exposure.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-07.B: Stale Handle and Wrong Kind Diagnostics
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-07: Resource Lifecycle and JS-Native Handles
tasks.summary: Validate stale IDs, wrong kinds, double close, and leak reporting.
tasks.goal: Make native handle failures deterministic and debuggable.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-07.C: JS-Native Handle Bridge Conventions
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-07: Resource Lifecycle and JS-Native Handles
tasks.summary: Document the conventions for JS wrappers over native resource IDs.
tasks.goal: Prepare data/provider bridge work without inventing unsafe ad hoc handles.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-08.A: SQLite Native Intrinsics
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-08: SQLite JS-to-Native Data Bridge
tasks.summary: Expose SQLite open/query/exec through safe runtime intrinsics.
tasks.goal: Bridge the native SQLite provider to JavaScript without raw pointers.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-08.B: SQLite JS Resource Wrapper
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-08: SQLite JS-to-Native Data Bridge
tasks.summary: Implement the JS wrapper over SQLite resource IDs.
tasks.goal: Make data.sqlite.open real for the alpha-supported SQLite path.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-08.C: Executable SQLite Example Decision
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-08: SQLite JS-to-Native Data Bridge
tasks.summary: Either add an executable SQLite example or explicitly defer it.
tasks.goal: Prevent EPIC-28 from publishing a fake SQLite alpha tutorial.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-09.A: Live Provider Test Reporting
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-09: Provider Hardening
tasks.summary: Harden live PostgreSQL and SQL Server test reporting.
tasks.goal: Keep provider claims separate from default skipped live tests.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-09.B: Provider Pool Lifecycle Hardening
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-09: Provider Hardening
tasks.summary: Harden provider pool close/drain/health diagnostics.
tasks.goal: Make provider pools trustworthy enough for alpha-supported usage.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-09.C: Provider Runtime Dependency Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-09: Provider Hardening
tasks.summary: Document runtime dependency packaging for SQLite, libpq, and ODBC.
tasks.goal: Avoid implying package smoke proves live provider availability.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-10.A: Capability Plan Section
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-10: Capability and Security Hardening
tasks.summary: Add capability metadata to the validated Plan contract.
tasks.goal: Give runtime enforcement a source of truth.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-10.B: Runtime Capability Registry and Provider Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-10: Capability and Security Hardening
tasks.summary: Enforce declared capabilities for supported provider access.
tasks.goal: Make capability metadata real rather than audit-only.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-10.C: Denied Access Diagnostics and Audit Fixtures
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-10: Capability and Security Hardening
tasks.summary: Add denied-access diagnostics and audit fixtures for missing capabilities.
tasks.goal: Make unsupported or denied resource access clear to users and tools.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-11.A: CLI Metadata From Compiler Artifacts
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-11: CLI Introspection Hardening
tasks.summary: Make CLI introspection consume real compiler/app-host metadata.
tasks.goal: Move routes/doctor/audit/openapi beyond fixture-only confidence.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-11.B: Alpha Audit Rule Set
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-11: CLI Introspection Hardening
tasks.summary: Add alpha safety audit rules with deterministic fixtures.
tasks.goal: Surface duplicate routes, missing capabilities, provider gaps, and unsupported docs claims.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-11.C: OpenAPI Alpha Schema Policy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-11: CLI Introspection Hardening
tasks.summary: Define what OpenAPI generation supports during alpha.
tasks.goal: Avoid implying full schema/security generation before it exists.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-12.A: Cross-Platform Package Smoke Strategy
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-12: Packaging and Cross-Platform Hardening
tasks.summary: Add or explicitly defer Linux/macOS package smoke validation.
tasks.goal: Make package evidence cross-platform or honestly Windows-local.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-12.B: V8 Runtime Packaging Validation
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-12: Packaging and Cross-Platform Hardening
tasks.summary: Define and validate how V8 runtime files are packaged when enabled.
tasks.goal: Avoid confusing V8 SDK layout with end-user runtime packaging.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-12.C: Sanitizer and Fuzz Gate Plan
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-12: Packaging and Cross-Platform Hardening
tasks.summary: Plan sanitizer/fuzz gates for parsers, resources, and providers.
tasks.goal: Track safety validation without pretending it is already in default CI.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-13.A: Executable Hello Conformance
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-13: End-to-End Conformance Suite
tasks.summary: Add end-to-end conformance for the executable hello path.
tasks.goal: Protect the supported alpha hello workflow through the real toolchain.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-13.B: Request Context Conformance
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-13: End-to-End Conformance Suite
tasks.summary: Add end-to-end request context conformance for supported route/query behavior.
tasks.goal: Ensure documented request context behavior matches runtime execution.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-13.C: Unsupported Behavior Conformance
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-13: End-to-End Conformance Suite
tasks.summary: Add conformance tests for unsupported features that must fail clearly.
tasks.goal: Prevent future fake-success regressions.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-14.A: Benchmark Methodology Refresh
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-14: Benchmarks and Performance Methodology
tasks.summary: Define release-only measured benchmark methodology and metadata.
tasks.goal: Separate benchmark smoke from performance evidence.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-14.B: Real Path Benchmark Gating Decision
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-14: Benchmarks and Performance Methodology
tasks.summary: Decide when real HTTP/V8 benchmarks are ready to add.
tasks.goal: Avoid measuring unstable or synthetic paths as public alpha performance.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-14.C: No Public Comparison Claims Check
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-14: Benchmarks and Performance Methodology
tasks.summary: Add docs/checklist language preventing external performance comparisons before comparable paths exist.
tasks.goal: Keep public alpha claims honest.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-15.A: Executable Hello Tutorial
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-15: Public Alpha Documentation and Examples
tasks.summary: Publish an executable hello tutorial only after the MAIN path is verified.
tasks.goal: Document a real workflow, not an aspirational one.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-15.B: SQLite Demo Or Explicit Deferral
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-15: Public Alpha Documentation and Examples
tasks.summary: Publish executable SQLite docs only if the JS-native bridge works; otherwise defer clearly.
tasks.goal: Prevent a fake public database tutorial.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN1-15.C: Public Alpha Checklist
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN1-15: Public Alpha Documentation and Examples
tasks.summary: Create the final public alpha checklist after MAIN.1 criteria pass.
tasks.goal: Ensure public docs do not overclaim alpha readiness.
